title: Workout Energy Mapping
text: Workout playlists usually score high on energy and danceability. Upbeat pop and edm tracks are commonly used for exercise motivation.

title: Late Night Focus Guidance
text: Late-night focus listening often favors lofi, ambient, and low-to-mid energy songs with moderate tempo and higher acousticness.

title: Bridge Recommendations
text: When top songs are too similar, include one bridge track from a neighboring energy band to improve discovery without losing mood fit.

title: Acoustic Preference Note
text: Words like acoustic, unplugged, warm, and intimate often map to higher acousticness and slightly lower energy targets.

title: Mood Language Mapping
text: Happy and euphoric language tends to align with higher valence. Moody and reflective language tends to align with lower valence.

title: Known Biases in Small Catalogs
text: Small catalogs can over-represent a few genres or energy ranges. Add transparency warnings when recommendations cluster too tightly.

title: Driving Session Vibes
text: Night driving sessions often use synthwave and moody pop with mid-high energy and steady tempo.

title: Calm Recovery Listening
text: Recovery and wind-down sessions usually work best with chill or serene moods, low energy, and acoustic or ambient textures.

title: Reggaeton Party Mapping
text: Reggaeton and party playlists usually target high danceability, mid-high energy, and positive valence for social settings.

title: EDM Festival Energy
text: EDM requests usually want euphoric mood, very high energy, strong danceability, and a fast club tempo.

title: Indie Pop Glow
text: Indie pop often sits between happy and dreamy, with moderate energy, warm tone, and a lighter groove than mainstream pop.

title: Hip Hop Momentum
text: Hip hop recommendations usually benefit from confident mood, strong groove, and a beat-forward rhythm that stays grounded.

title: Synthwave Neon Flow
text: Synthwave works well for driving, nostalgia, and steady mid-high energy with a glossy electronic feel.

title: Lofi Study Session
text: Lofi should feel focused and calm, with lower energy, gentle percussion, and a cozy late-night atmosphere.

title: Upbeat Pop Appeal
text: Pop tends to work best with upbeat hooks, positive valence, and an accessible radio-friendly energy profile.

title: Nostalgic Folk Warmth
text: Nostalgic folk songs typically lean acoustic and intimate, with lower-to-mid energy, gentle rhythm, and reflective warmth suited for tracks like morning trail or campfire listening.

title: Nostalgic R&B Flow
text: Nostalgic R&B usually favors mellow groove, softer energy, and a warm emotional tone with moderate valence rather than party intensity.

title: Metal Aggression Mapping
text: Aggressive metal tracks usually prioritize very high energy, lower valence, and dense, forceful arrangements over dance-focused rhythm.

title: Intense Rock Drive
text: Intense rock recommendations often blend driving guitars with high energy and mid valence while staying less dance-forward than pop or club music.

title: Romantic Pop Blend
text: Romantic pop tends to sit in a mid-energy space with warm vocal tone, moderate danceability, and positive-leaning valence.

title: Romantic R&B Night
text: Romantic R&B favors intimate grooves, softer dynamics, and smooth low-to-mid energy with a warm emotional profile.

title: Reflective Country Storytelling
text: Reflective country songs emphasize storytelling, acoustic texture, and steady mid tempo with moderate energy and thoughtful mood.

title: Carefree Reggae Lift
text: Carefree reggae works best with easy groove, sunny tone, and relaxed but steady rhythm in a mid-energy range.

title: Serene Classical Space
text: Serene classical listening favors very low energy, high acousticness, and calm emotional contour with minimal rhythmic emphasis.

title: Relaxed Jazz Pocket
text: Relaxed jazz usually pairs moderate warmth with gentle swing, low-to-mid energy, and organic instrumentation.

title: Groovy Psychedelic Drift
text: Groovy psychedelic rock often uses trippy textures, circular rhythms, and mid-high energy while keeping a colorful, exploratory mood.
